intended_rule: Reduce GLD when renewed weakness confirms the active 395/392 risk band.
actual_execution: Two filled sells of 5 shares each at displayed prices 390.91 and 391.05 reduced GLD from 20 to 10 shares.
account_risk_improvement: GLD concentration was halved and cash increased.
short_term_price_outcome: GLD remained weak near 387.70 after the fills.
execution_price_context: The displayed filled prices are broker order-record evidence.
review_conclusion: The first two GLD reduction tranches are completed and rule-compliant; residual 10-share risk remains.
lessons_learned: Ordinary GLD concentration protection operated independently of the already closed UGL position.
Residual GLD needs a new 385/380 staged defense.
next_rule_update: Hold 10; reduce 5 below 385; consider clearing remaining 5 below 380; downgrade alert after 400-405 recovery.
